title: MATERIALIZE-ORACLE output — mutation certification for high-blast components

oracle_ref.description: Path to oracle.json this certification covers

high_blast_components.description: Component ids requiring mutation certification (auth/money/data-integrity domains)

high_blast_rationale.description: Reasoning for why named components are high-blast

high_blast_basis.description: Source basis for high-blast classification (e.g. component domain)

verdict.description: Mutation certification verdict: kill-strong | kill-weak | inconclusive

overall_verdict.description: Narrative summary of the certification verdict

uncertified_tests.description: Oracle test ids not covered by certification with rationale

oracle_id.description: Oracle test id excluded from certification

reason.description: Reason this test is not mutation-certified

certified_tests.description: Per-test mutation certification records with fault seeds and kill evidence

target.description: Contract or AC id this test certifies

high_blast_reason.description: Why this test covers a high-blast component

fault_seeds.description: Injected fault scenarios and which test kills each

fault.description: Description of the seeded fault mutation

killed_by.description: Test function that kills this fault

kill_strength.description: Summary kill strength statement (all N faults killed, etc.)
